subject: expose portal-app ssl nodeport 16 in oom
commit_message:

Patch Set 1:

Good point – left it unchanged – already was set for 8443 – (adjusted the wiki to reflect 8443 instead of 9989 – which was not used)
I did a global search just to be sure

https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/portal/charts/portal-app/values.yaml#n68
  externalPort4: 8443
  internalPort4: 8443
  nodePort4: 16


From: WELCH, LORRAINE A <lb2391@att.com> 
Sent: Thursday, October 4, 2018 3:47 PM
To: Michael O'Brien <Frank.Obrien@amdocs.com>; TATTAVARADA, SUNDER <statta@research.att.com>; TALASILA, MANOOP <talasila@research.att.com>; Gary Wu <gary.i.wu@huawei.com>
Cc: ANAPAN-LAVALLE, HECTOR A <ha076r@att.com>; Mike Elliott <Mike.Elliott@amdocs.com>; Mandeep Khinda <Mandeep.Khinda@amdocs.com>
Subject: RE: New node port for Portal's HTTPS port

Hi
Just curious where is the node port mapping kept in gerrit? I.e. 8443 to 30225 ?
Or is it keep somewhere else?
I could not find node port mapping in the OOM repository.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

assuming 30216 is not used elsewhere; I'm approving this. Thanks for the support Michael.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Did a search – missed policy
https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/policy/charts/brmsgw/values.yaml#n65
  portName: brmsgw
  externalPort: 9989
  nodePort: 16
updating the wiki
switching to 25 – good catch - only the CD deploy would have caught this
repatch in 20 min

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

waiting to be changed to 30225
